name: HMS ML 558 (ML 558)
events: 13 Jan 1944 At 1500 A/13, HMS Uproar (Lt. L.E. Herrick, DSC, RN) and HMS Ultor (Lt. G.E. Hunt, DSC, RN) departed La Maddalena for Naples. They were escorted by HMML 121 (T/Lt. E.J. Bower, RNVR), HMML 134 (T/Lt. J.N. Barfield, SANF(V)) and HMML 558 (T/Lt. P.I. Fellows, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
